text:
- Fix build on 7.x after objformat removal
  However, devel/libtool installs .la files are pkg-plist are changed.
  Therefore, bump PORTREVISION.

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-ltmain.sh

Port maintainer (gnome@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
